prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东南大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约3460名、3881名、3347名、2592名、2652名。2021–2022年位次后移，2023年回升至3347名，2024年大幅前移至2592名，2025年基本持平于2652名。近两年位次稳定在2600名附近，较2021–2022年明显前移约800名，表明该校在北京考生中的竞争力持续增强；东南大学在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年39人、2022年44人、2023年44人、2024年44人、2025年46人、2026年（招生计划文件）51人。2026年较2025年扩招5人（增幅约10.9%），连续两年扩招，对竞争有一定缓解作用，但扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东南大学是教育部直属的985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第15名（2025年第16名、2024年第13名），稳居全国Top20，属于顶尖工科强校，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2021–2023年东南大学曾出现偏负面声誉事件（校园安全、师德师风），但2024–2026年声誉周期内无新增重大负面舆情，舆情趋于平稳。抖音热度方面，2022年曾位列高热第6名，近年热度有所下降，2026年未进入前100名，整体关注度一般，未出现明显报考过热信号。投档异常文件中无东南大学相关记录，说明近年录取走势平稳，未出现断档或暴跌；东南大学拥有18个A-及以上学科，其中A+学科5个（建筑学、土木工程、交通运输工程、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术），A学科4个（仪器科学与技术、信息与通信工程、城乡规划学、风景园林学），A-学科9个。工科实力突出，建筑、电子、信息、交通等王牌专业对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、人工智能等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与东南大学优势学科高度契合。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84,900人，较2025年65,434人增加约29.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧。；东南大学位于江苏省南京市，属于京外高校。北京市考生对京外985高校的接受度较高，东南大学作为华东地区顶尖工科强校，地域因素对其在北京的招生影响中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：近两年位次稳定在2600名附近（利好）、2026年扩招约10.9%（缓解竞争）、考生总数大增约29.7%（加剧竞争）、学校层次高且优势学科突出（持续吸引高分考生）、声誉舆情平稳。扩招与考生大增两股力量对冲后，考生大增的竞争效应略占主导，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约2875名，区间2547–3203名。

- 计算机类。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2875名，区间2547–3203名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如2547名以内）可重点冲刺一档的吴健雄班、电子信息类或计算机类；位次接近区间上限（如3203名附近）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入东南大学。东南大学工科实力整体强劲，各档专业均有A类学科支撑，即使进入三档专业也可通过校内转专业或辅修等方式拓展发展空间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southeast University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 3460, 3881, 3347, 2592, and 2652 respectively. Rankings moved backward in 2021–2022, rebounded to 3347 in 2023, significantly advanced to 2592 in 2024, and remained roughly stable at 2652 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings have stabilized around 2600, advancing about 800 places compared to 2021–2022, indicating the university's growing competitiveness among Beijing examinees. Southeast University's enrollment plan in Beijing's comprehensive category: 39 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 44 in 2024, 46 in 2025, and 51 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). In 2026, there is an increase of 5 students (approximately 10.9%) compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of expansion, which somewhat alleviates competition, but the expansion is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university directly under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 15th (16th in 2025, 13th in 2024), consistently in the national Top 20, making it a top-tier engineering powerhouse with sustained appeal to high-scoring examinees. From 2021 to 2023, Southeast University experienced some negative reputation incidents (campus safety, teacher ethics), but in the 2024–2026 reputation cycle, no major negative public opinion emerged, and sentiment has stabilized. In terms of Douyin popularity, it ranked 6th in 2022, but its popularity has declined in recent years, not entering the top 100 in 2026, with overall attention being moderate and no signs of excessive application heat. There are no records related to Southeast University in the abnormal submission files, indicating stable admission trends in recent years without gaps or sharp drops. Southeast University has 18 A- or above disciplines, including 5 A+ disciplines (Architecture, Civil Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, and Electronic Science and Technology), 4 A disciplines (Instrument Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, and Landscape Architecture), and 9 A- disciplines. Its engineering strength is outstanding, with flagship majors like Architecture, Electronics, Information, and Transportation strongly attracting examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence continue to have high social popularity, closely aligning with Southeast University's advantageous disciplines. The total number of Beijing examinees for the 2026 college entrance exam is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, leading to a significant rise in competition. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, and is a university outside Beijing. Beijing examinees have a relatively high acceptance of 985 universities outside Beijing, and as a top engineering powerhouse in East China, the regional factor has a neutral to positive impact on its admissions in Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: rankings stabilized around 2600 in the past two years (positive), a 10.9% enrollment expansion in 2026 (easing competition), a 29.7% increase in examinee numbers (intensifying competition), high university level with outstanding advantageous disciplines (continuously attracting high-scoring examinees), and stable reputation. The effects of expansion and the increase in examinees offset each other, with the competitive effect of the examinee increase slightly dominant. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2875, with a range of 2547–3203.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 2875, with a range of 2547–3203. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 2547), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors like Wu Jianxiong Class, Electronic Information Class, or Computer Science Class. If your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (e.g., around 3203), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors to secure admission to Southeast University. Southeast University has strong overall engineering strength, with A-class disciplines supporting all tiers of majors. Even if you enter a Tier 3 major, you can expand your development opportunities through internal transfer or minor programs.
